company: CCE Fellows Portal — CCE IIT Mandi
description: Built and deployed production portal using Next.js, Firebase (Auth, Firestore, Storage), Node.js serving 200+ active users; designed architecture to scale to 1k+ users.
Production deployment on institutional Linux servers using PM2 process management and Apache reverse proxy with SSL.

company: Vertex — Institute App for IIT Mandi
description: Designed and implemented a dynamic Feeds module and About page, enhancing platform content visibility.
Refactored feed schema to support nullable host configuration, improving data flexibility.
Implemented automated dashboard image updates from shared resources, reducing manual maintenance.
Led UI enhancements and branding updates, including full application rename and structural navigation improvements.
Organised KrackHack, a 48-hour hackathon with 800+ participants from across India.
Coordinated logistics, judging panels, and technical infrastructure for the event.
Problem setter at FCC (Fresher Coding Contest 2026) at IIT Mandi.
Contributing to competitive programming activities and mentoring freshers.

company: Science & Technical Council — Student Gymkhana IIT Mandi
description: Developing and maintaining web infrastructure for the Student Gymkhana.
Contributing to the digital presence of IIT Mandi's technical community.
Designed and deployed a no-code automation workflow integrating Twilio WhatsApp API with Google Sheets to collect and log user preferences.
Built end-to-end data pipeline: Incoming WhatsApp message → webhook trigger → Router-based input validation → Conditional logic → Automatic row append in Google Sheets with timestamp + phone number.
Implemented structured data logging system with validation checks to prevent incorrect inputs and ensure clean dataset collection.
